nasb.text: When they had brought them, they stood them before the Council. The high priest questioned them,

esv.text: And when they had brought them, they set them before the council. And the high priest questioned them,

cnv.text: 既然帶來了，就叫他們站在公議會前。大祭司問他們：

ccb.text: 使徒被带来后站在公会前，大祭司盘问他们，说：

csbs.text: 他们把使徒们带来后，叫他们站在议会当中。大祭司质问他们，
